step_description: Read, write, and command operational latencies
narrative_hint: [DEMO CONTEXT] Write operations have an abnormally high average latency of 48.2ms, with spikes up to 1450ms. Read latencies remain sub-millisecond on average. The writes are locking/blocking queues on collections without appropriate write indexes or index contention on logs. Analyzing the database profiler log next is advised to find the actual queries.
